title: Gardeners Digest September
excerpt: Hi - You may be coming here from Michelle's blog or you may just be a regular. Either way, welcome! As you may have noticed, it's been a while (since April to be exact) since I have done one of…
body:
Hi - You may be coming here from Michelle's blog or you may just be a regular. Either way, welcome! As you may have noticed, it's been a while (since April to be exact) since I have done one of these. Excited to be back with some of the Garden Girls from Two Peas In A Bucket who are doing a little blog hop.

1. Love this Studio Calico paper to pieces. It was used as the cover of my baby shower album, which I should probably get photos of and share soon.

2. These Maggie Holmes bows - love the different sizes and colors. They are even cuter in person and can be seen in action in my last Project Life video.

3. Probably shouldn't choose my own product, but since there's been so much buzz about it, I thought I would link up the Cut & Paste Project Life mini kit.

4.Have had this portable Fiskars trimmer for years now and it still remains my favorite. It's compact and works great.

5. Remember my favorite Uni-ball Signo white gel pen? As in the only white gel pen you need? Well there's a gold version you may want too. In fact, I highly recommend stocking up.

This layout by Arohammer using memorabilia and all kinds of fun embellishments.Next stop is Janna. The last stop on the hop is Two Peas blog where you will also see the entire list of participants.
